title: Red Pines
description: A bold, stylized take on pine trees with striking red foliage. These red pines bring a surreal yet elegant look to your forests, perfect for fantasy, fall, or enchanted world builds.
body:
**The Red Pines pack** introduces a vivid reimagining of classic pine trees, replacing traditional green needles with deep, vibrant reds. The foliage maintains a sleek, stylized shape—more defined and angular than the bushy variant—emphasizing clean silhouettes and verticality. This design strikes a balance between fantasy and minimalism, allowing the trees to blend well into both high-fantasy landscapes and stylized autumn environments. The red tones shift slightly in light, giving the forest a dynamic, moody ambiance. Ideal for builders seeking to create unique, atmospheric biomes without overwhelming visual complexity.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
